data.content: Plan review feedback: 1. The create-path step is too ambiguous. Do not put acceptance only in knot.created. Current sync/rehydration only reduce explicit metadata events like knot.description_set; knot.created data is not projected into acceptance/body fields, so acceptance would be lost on create/pull/rehydrate unless create emits a dedicated knot.acceptance_set event or the created-event reducers are expanded. 2. The plan omits required foolery integration files and tests. Switching the knots backend off the addNote shim also requires ../foolery/src/lib/knots.ts to model/serialize acceptance for kno new/update, and existing foolery tests that currently assert note-shim behavior must be updated to assert the first-class field instead.
